summary: BLOCK 585/587 OAuth Banner Relaxation and Conditional Banner Logic - All tests PASS. Backend API endpoint POST /api/discogs/update-import-intent works for PENDING/LATER/DECLINED/CONNECTED values. Frontend OAuth banner correctly shows when intent=LATER and discogs_oauth_verified=false. Banner has 'Connect Discogs' button, 'Skip for now' link, and X dismiss button. Banner z-index (200000) is above navbar (100000). Skip for now sets localStorage key and hides banner. Banner is permanently hidden when intent=DECLINED or CONNECTED.

issues: 503 errors for some image proxy requests (Discogs rate limiting - not a bug)
React warning about nested <a> tags in DailyPromptCard (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 585/587 ✅ - App.js: Banner shows when intentShowsBanner() returns true (LATER intent && !oauth_verified)
BLOCK 585/587 ✅ - App.js: isSkippedRecently() checks localStorage 'honeygroove_discogs_skip_ts' with 24h window
BLOCK 585/587 ✅ - App.js: Banner has data-testid='oauth-glassy-banner' at z-index 200000
BLOCK 585/587 ✅ - App.js: Banner copy matches requirement: 'Want to import your collection? Connect your Discogs account to sync your library instantly.'
BLOCK 585/587 ✅ - App.js: CSS variable --oauth-banner-h set to 49px when banner shows, 0px when hidden
BLOCK 585/587 ✅ - Navbar.js: Uses top: var(--oauth-banner-h, 0px) for offset
BLOCK 585/587 ✅ - DiscogsSecurityModal.js: Has 3 buttons (Connect Discogs, Maybe Later, Proceed without Discogs)
BLOCK 585/587 ✅ - models.py: UserResponse includes discogs_import_intent field with default 'PENDING'
BLOCK 585/587 ✅ - auth.py: _build_user_response includes discogs_import_intent from user document
context_for_next_testing_agent: User intent has been reset to LATER. OAuth banner should be visible on login. localStorage key 'honeygroove_discogs_skip_ts' controls 24h skip. Test user is admin with discogs_oauth_verified=false. The DiscogsSecurityModal appears when needs_discogs_migration is true (controlled by has_seen_security_migration flag).

oauth_banner_visibility.description: Banner shows when discogs_import_intent=LATER and discogs_oauth_verified=false

oauth_banner_elements.description: Banner has Connect Discogs button, Skip for now link, X dismiss button

skip_for_now_functionality.description: Clicking Skip for now hides banner and sets localStorage flag

navbar_snap_back.description: When banner hides, CSS variable --oauth-banner-h becomes 0px

declined_permanent_hide.description: When intent is DECLINED, banner is permanently hidden

connected_permanent_hide.description: When intent is CONNECTED, banner is permanently hidden

discogs_security_modal_buttons.description: DiscogsSecurityModal has 3 buttons: Connect Discogs, Maybe Later, Proceed without Discogs
